explanatoryNotes: Private fundraising looks relatively diffuse: the top ten donors account for only 9% of reported private contributions.
60 donors gave at the legal maximum, totaling $91,895.
Committees, unions, or other non-individual donors made up 18% of reported private fundraising.
A noticeable share of reported private fundraising, 38%, came from outside New York City.
Among reported private contributions, legal stands out as one of the strongest donor patterns.
